listitem.para: Identify three common health conditions among Puerto Ricans. What educational recommendation would you make to decrease them?
Explain the “hot” and “cold” theory of foods and illnesses. If you are unfamiliar with the foods, what might you do to learn more about them?
Describe Puerto Rican communication practices, including temporality and punctuality.
What are men’s and women’s roles in the traditional Puerto Rican culture?
What are acceptable fertility control practices for traditional Puerto Ricans? How might they view the use of condoms?
Explain Santería. For what conditions would a Puerto Rican cult a practitioner of Santería?
What are some traditional practices for pregnancy?
Does the sex of the provider raise any concerns? If yes, please explain the stated reasons.
What might you do to get allopathic and traditional practitioners to work together?
Identify the death and funeral practices of traditional Puerto Ricans.
